display.purpose: Rare page-level orientation only. Not for app panels.

headline.purpose: Major workflow sections and empty states.

title.purpose: Brand link, list item names, dialog titles, compact headings.

body.purpose: Default interface copy, addresses, metadata, and descriptions.

label.purpose: Button labels, field labels, tags, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: popover-lift
shadows.purpose: Search result popovers and temporary lists.

shadows.name: marker-lift
shadows.purpose: Map markers and tiny objects sitting on complex map imagery.

shadows.name: legacy-glow
shadows.purpose: Existing card glow. Do not expand this pattern.

motion.name: control-state
motion.value: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease
motion.purpose: Default control focus and hover transitions.

motion.name: surface-state
motion.purpose: Existing broad transition vocabulary. Replace with property-specific transitions as components mature.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Use for save, submit, and commit actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--cta-primary, oklch(0.63 0.21 52)); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 12px); background: var(--cta-primary, oklch(0.63 0.21 52)); color: var(--bg-light, oklch(0.9762 0.0134 267.1)); font: inherit; font-weight: 650; line-height: 1.25; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--cta-primary-hover, oklch(0.69 0.23 52)); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) l c h / 0.2); }

components.name: Quiet Button
components.description: Use for clear, cancel, and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-quiet { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--bg-low-contrast, oklch(0.9262 0.0134 267.1)); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 12px); background: var(--bg-light, oklch(0.9762 0.0134 267.1)); color: var(--bg-high-contrast, oklch(0.297 0.0134 267.1)); font: inherit; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-quiet:hover { background: var(--bg-color, oklch(1 0.0134 267.1)); } .ds-btn-quiet:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) l c h / 0.2); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Primary search field for places and locations.
components.html: <label class="ds-search"><input type="search" placeholder="Search for a spot" /><button type="button" aria-label="Clear search">×</button></label>
components.css: .ds-search { width: 100%; min-height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: stretch; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--bg-low-contrast, oklch(0.9262 0.0134 267.1)); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 12px); background: var(--bg-light, oklch(0.9762 0.0134 267.1)); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) l c h / 0.2); } .ds-search input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--bg-high-contrast, oklch(0.297 0.0134 267.1)); padding: 10px 18px; font: inherit; outline: none; } .ds-search button { min-width: 40px; border: 0; border-left: 1px solid var(--bg-low-contrast, oklch(0.9262 0.0134 267.1)); background: transparent; color: var(--error, oklch(0.62 0.20 24)); font: inherit; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Floating Search Action
components.description: Circular discovery entry point used over map and saved-list surfaces.
components.html: <button class="ds-floating-search" type="button" aria-label="Search"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10.5 18a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 5.3-12.8 7.5 7.5 0 0 1-5.3 12.8Zm5.8-1.7 4.2 4.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" /></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-floating-search { width: 42px; height: 42px; display: inline-grid; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)); color: var(--bg-light, oklch(0.9762 0.0134 267.1)); box-shadow: var(--cta-box-shadow, 4px 4px 8px 0 #bbb); cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-floating-search svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-floating-search:hover { background: oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) calc(l - 0.05) c h); } .ds-floating-search:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) l c h / 0.25), var(--cta-box-shadow, 4px 4px 8px 0 #bbb); }

components.name: Saved Spot Row
components.description: Compact edge-to-edge row for saved places with address metadata.
components.html: Superiority Burger119 Avenue A, New York
components.css: .ds-spot-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; background: var(--bg-color, oklch(1 0.0134 267.1)); color: var(--bg-high-contrast, oklch(0.297 0.0134 267.1)); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bg-low-contrast, oklch(0.9262 0.0134 267.1)); } .ds-spot-row a { color: var(--cta-color, oklch(0.68 0.16 45)); text-decoration: none; } .ds-spot-row small { display: block; margin-top: 2px; color: var(--text-muted, oklch(0.7 0.02 105)); } .ds-spot-row button { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; color: var(--bg-medium-contrast, oklch(0.667 0.0134 267.1)); cursor: pointer; } .ds-spot-row button:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent-color, oklch(0.6892 0.1425 166.1212)) l c h / 0.2); }

components.name: Search Results Popover
components.description: Temporary result list that appears beneath anchored search controls.
components.html:
• Cafe Mogador4.6 · East Village
  • Yellow Rose4.5 · East Village
components.css: .ds-results { width: min(360px, 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--bg-low-contrast, oklch(0.9262 0.0134 267.1)); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 12px); background: var(--bg-light, oklch(0.9762 0.0134 267.1)); color: var(--bg-high-contrast, oklch(0.297 0.0134 267.1)); box-shadow: 0.25rem 0.5rem 1rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .ds-results li { padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-results li:hover { background: var(--bg-color, oklch(1 0.0134 267.1)); } .ds-results em { display: block; font-style: italic; } .ds-results span { display: flex; gap: 6px; color: var(--text-muted, oklch(0.7 0.02 105)); font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview:
Bite Marks should feel like a compact city notebook for food discovery: practical, fast to scan, and lightly marked by the texture of streets, maps, receipts, and saved places. The system is product-first. It supports search, save, tag, map, and revisit workflows without behaving like a landing page.

The current code already points toward this: warm orange action color, mint map/action accents, cool tinted neutrals, system UI typography, rounded controls, compact spacing, and mobile-first map/list surfaces. The next layer should add urban texture through restrained material cues such as fine grain, map-line rhythm, receipt-like dividers, or inked labels. Texture must never reduce readability.

It explicitly rejects the PRODUCT.md anti-references: "marketing landing page", "lifestyle blog", "generic SaaS dashboard", "glossy restaurant reservation platform", "oversized hero sections", "cream-and-purple startup styling", "heavy cards everywhere", "cute food illustrations as the main identity", and "decorative texture that gets in the way of scanning."
keyCharacteristics: Compact mobile-first surfaces for quick outdoor or between-decision use.
Restrained OKLCH palette with warm action, mint location, and cool concrete neutrals.
System UI typography with clear weight contrast and no decorative font dependency.
Tactile controls: rounded, full-border, direct, and easy to tap.
Texture as material signal, not decoration.

rules.name: The Street-Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange means commit, mint means location, red means destructive. Do not swap those meanings for variety.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Accent Rule
rules.body: On a product screen, saturated colors should usually occupy less than 10% of the visible area. The surface is neutral so the next action is obvious.

rules.name: The No Poster Type Rule
rules.body: This is a product, not a landing page. Oversized type is forbidden unless the screen is an empty state or first-run orientation with no competing workflow.

rules.name: The Zero Letter-Spacing Rule
rules.body: Use normal letter spacing. Do not use negative tracking; the existing percentage letter-spacing values should be treated as legacy drift and corrected as components are touched.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Normal app surfaces are flat. Elevation appears only for temporary, floating, or map-adjacent layers.

rules.name: The No Heavy Card Rule
rules.body: Do not solve layout with card stacks. PRODUCT.md explicitly rejects "heavy cards everywhere."

dos: Do preserve the current OKLCH token direction and introduce new colors as OKLCH values.
Do use `city-paper`, `paper-raised`, and `concrete-line` for most of the surface.
Do reserve Burnt Orange for commit actions and Map Mint for location or map actions.
Do add texture through subtle material cues: grain, receipt dividers, map-line rhythm, small stamped tags, or ink-like labels.
Do keep tap targets at or above `40px` for buttons, inputs, and icon controls.
Do use full borders, tonal fills, or icon/label structure for emphasis.
Do keep product workflows visible: search, save, tag, map, and revisit.
donts: Don't make it feel like a "marketing landing page."
Don't make it feel like a "lifestyle blog."
Don't make it feel like a "generic SaaS dashboard."
Don't make it feel like a "glossy restaurant reservation platform."
Don't use "oversized hero sections" inside the app shell.
Don't use "cute food illustrations as the main identity."
Don't add "decorative texture that gets in the way of scanning."
Don't keep Tailwind-style blue utility styling on product surfaces; migrate those leftovers into the shared OKLCH system.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or hero-metric templates.
